message:
fix(ensemble): check pre-canceled context in StreamSynthesize

The goroutine in StreamSynthesize used a select with both ctx.Done()
and a buffered channel send. When the context was already canceled,
the select was non-deterministic - the buffered send could win the
race, emitting a chunk before observing cancellation. Add an explicit
ctx.Err() check at goroutine entry to avoid the race.

Fixes flaky TestSynthesizer_StreamSynthesize_Canceled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -76,6 +76,12 @@ func (s *Synthesizer) StreamSynthesize(ctx context.Context, input *SynthesisInpu
 		defer close(chunks)
 		defer close(errs)
 
+		// Check for pre-canceled context before doing any work.
+		if ctx.Err() != nil {
+			errs <- ctx.Err()
+			return
+		}
+
 		if s == nil {
 			errs <- fmt.Errorf("synthesizer is nil")
 			return
